headline: ARM's Expanding Royalty Opportunity Is Powering Its AI Growth Story
summary: Arm Holdings' expanding royalty opportunities and AI-focused chip strategy are strengthening its long-term growth potential.

headline: Benchmark initiates Synopsys, Cadence with Buy ratings on AI-driven EDA outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Benchmark initiated coverage of electronic design automation (EDA) software leaders Synopsys and Cadence Design Systems with Buy ratings, citing strong long-term demand driven by artificial intelligence, semiconductor design complexity and resilient industry fundamentals.

headline: Recent Report Shows That Rep. Byron Donalds Sold Up to $60K Worth of Cadence Design Systems Stock

headline: Benchmark Initiates Coverage On Cadence Design Systems with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $450
summary: Benchmark  analyst Gary Mobley   initiates coverage on Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $450.
